strategy: Hit with Fire or Myth, he takes +15% from each, and avoid Storm and Ice (50% resist each).
If you Feint him he throws up a Tower Shield, bring Melt to dispel it before you hit.
Do not heal. Any heal, including pet maycast heals, makes him self-cast Healing Current. Pre-shield and tank instead.
Plan your kill around his globals: Darkwind on Round 4, Balefrost on Round 8, Darkwind again on Round 12. Aim to burst before Round 4 or right after clearing a global.
Stack a Feint, clear his Tower Shield with Melt, add blades, and land one big Fire or Myth hit.
cheatNotes: Join late and he opens with Wild Bolt on you.
Feint him and he answers with a Tower Shield, strip it with Melt before you hit.
Melt dispels that Tower Shield, so pack one when you plan to Feint.
Any heal you cast makes him self-cast Healing Current, avoid healing and pre-shield instead.
Pet maycast heals also trigger his Healing Current, so watch your pet.
He casts Darkwind at the start of Round 4.
He casts Balefrost at the start of Round 8.
He casts Darkwind again at the start of Round 12.
His pet Tiger randomly casts Storm Cat, Ice Cat (may strip a pip), or Snow Serpent, minor chip damage.
